title: eriogonum umbellatum var. munzii
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum var. munzii, also known as Munz's buckwheat, is a variety of the Eriogonum umbellatum plant, which is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eriogonum umbellatum var. munzii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as eczema and acne. Eriogonum umbellatum var. munzii can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or tincture, and its roots can be used to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
